entry.title: New: CR 24-100 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending ADOPTION of Resolution 24-161, CD1, to urge the Administration to prioritize the increased production and expansion of the distribution of recycled R-1 water to preserve potable water for the construction of affordable housing, and to support fire protection, greenbelts, agriculture, and cultural uses in the County of Maui.

Water and Infrastructure Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
